ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(OR(NATT_Legacy_Unit__c, NATT_Legacy_Option__c), OR(AND(NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__UpgradedAsset__c)), SBQQ__EffectiveQuantity__c > 0), AND(ISBLANK(SBQQ__UpgradedAsset__c), NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__Source__c)), SBQQ__Quantity__c > NATT_Legacy_Quantity__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not increase a quantity of a legacy unit or option.
